description_long: This is a Technics-branded record player with a rectangular, low-profile body and a prominent circular turntable platter at its center. The platter is black with a visible logo and a textured edge, surrounded by a metallic or plastic chassis in a muted gray color. On the right side, a tonearm assembly is mounted, featuring a metallic arm with a pivot and a headshell, positioned above the platter. Several control knobs and switches are located on the front and right edges, including a large start/stop button and a pitch control slider. The device stands on four sturdy, round feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, and no dust cover is present.
description: A Technics record player with a black platter, metallic tonearm, and multiple control knobs on a gray rectangular base. The design is sleek, functional, and elevated on four round feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Technics logo on the platter, tonearm assembly on the right, and control knobs along the front edge.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the tonearm's full length, the pitch control slider, and the platter's edge detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tonearm base and pivot visible on the left, and the platter's full circular shape and logo.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the tonearm's base, the start/stop button, and the platter's textured edge.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, centrally located, and circular, occupying a significant portion of the device's top surface. It is black with a visible Technics logo and a textured, possibly rubberized edge for grip. The platter appears to be made of metal with a rubber mat, featuring fine grooves and a matte finish.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and slender, extending from the right side of the device toward the center. It has a pivoting base, a headshell at the end, and is positioned above the platter, appearing to be in a resting or ready-to-play position. The finish is metallic silver with some black components.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small component attached to the end of the tonearm's headshell. It is small, likely made of metal and plastic, and appears as a distinct part at the tip of the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and buttons are present, including a large round start/stop button, a pitch control slider, and smaller switches. They are mostly black or silver, located on the front and right edges, and have clear markings for their functions.
